hero.title: Modular Furniture.
hero.subtitle: We design and manufacture high-quality modular furniture for home and industry. Pieces built to adapt to your space and grow with you.

md01.title: Innovative Design
md01.subtitle: Thoughtful Shapes & Contemporary Aesthetics
md01.description: Every piece is born from a careful design process that balances functionality with aesthetics. Clean forms, balanced proportions, and details that make a difference in any space.

hf02.title: Quality Materials
hf02.subtitle: Wood, Metal & Premium Upholstery
hf02.description: We select the finest materials: certified woods, high-strength metal structures, and premium upholstery. Durability and beauty that stand the test of time.

in03.title: Assemble It Yourself
in03.subtitle: Easy Assembly & Flexible Configuration
in03.description: Intuitive assembly system that requires no special tools. Configure, rearrange, and expand your furniture to suit your needs. Your space, your rules.

about.title: Functionality. Design. Quality.
about.description: Kokoilab is a modular furniture design and manufacturing studio. We create intelligent furniture solutions that adapt to real people and spaces, with a strong commitment to craftsmanship and contemporary design.

warmth.title: Total Modularity
warmth.subtitle: Configure & Reconfigure Your Space
warmth.description: Our modular systems adapt to any space and need. Add, remove, or rearrange pieces as your lifestyle evolves. Furniture that grows with you.

precision.title: Artisan Quality
precision.subtitle: Hand-finished in Colombia
precision.description: Every piece of furniture is inspected and hand-finished in our workshop. We use selected materials and rigorous production processes to ensure each piece is durable and perfect.

quality.title: Sustainable Design
quality.subtitle: Responsible Materials & Long Lifespan
quality.description: We believe in responsibly sourced materials and design that transcends passing trends. Furniture built to last decades, reduce waste, and care for the planet.

contact.title: Let's Talk About Your Space.
contact.description: Have questions about our modular furniture, need design advice, or want to place a custom order? Write to us, we're here to help.

success.title: Message Received
success.description: Your message reached our studio. We will get back to you within 48 hours to help you design your ideal space.

form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your space, what you need, or any questions you have...

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

footer.description: Designing the future of modular furniture. Made with love in Medellín, Colombia.
